text.title: Enterprise XR Applications Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-use-case
step.action: Pick one of 5 use cases; reject ill-fit (e.g., 2D-solvable problems).

step.name: verify-coverage
step.action: Compute headset_coverage_pct; if <50, secure procurement plan or descope.

step.name: declare-comfort-budget
step.action: Define max_continuous_minutes + break cadence + vestibular-safe motion.

step.name: spec-it-integration
step.action: List SSO + MDM + network + offline requirements.

step.name: security-review
step.action: Complete security checklist; obtain security sign-off.
